final_verdict_rationale: All 4 candidate mismatches reviewed manually and determined to be false positives. RANKED_FINDINGS.md lines 292-293 reference the SCAN-audit hypothesis register H2/H3 (exp53 AR(1) 6-D gate and exp55 length-stratified gamma), not the main HYPOTHESES_AND_TESTS.md H2/H3. PAPER.md line 304 context window overlaps the scale-invariance table (exp28) which contains scale-name tokens H_char_3/H_char_2 and FAILS verdict for L0, not H1/H2 hypothesis verdicts. Real cross-doc verdict drift: 0.
secondary_finding: H-ID prefix collision between the main HYPOTHESES_AND_TESTS.md and the SCAN-audit 03_HYPOTHESIS_REGISTER.md. Flagged for future disambiguation (prefix SCAN register IDs with SCAN-H). Not patched in this task - cosmetic documentation risk, no verdict drift.

H2.full_verdict_cell: NULL — R²=0.11; all Arabic corpora have near-identical H (4.03–4.19) and γ (0.040–0.049); no functional relationship

H4.full_verdict_cell: DETERMINATE — subspace T²=33.3 in PC4+PC5 (1.6% variance), perm p<0.0001; 54% of anomaly in blind spot; EL↔T r=+0.44 broken by Quran

H5.full_verdict_cell: SUGGESTIVE_UNIVERSAL — 4/7 strict; holds for Quran+poetry but NOT prose; genre-split law

H7.full_verdict_cell: DISTINCT — α=1.00 (classic Zipf), β=0.78 (lowest); Mahalanobis 2.39σ from ctrl centroid; prose-like α, compressed vocabulary growth

H8.full_verdict_cell: BENFORD_DEVIATING — all corpora deviate, but Quran is 2nd-most conforming (KL=0.015); poetry catastrophically non-Benford (KL≈2.6); d(KL)=−1.10

H9.full_verdict_cell: SUGGESTIVE — Quran τ=19.0 (global), per-unit τ=31.6 (lowest prose); d=−0.48, p=0.005; faster decorrelation than prose ctrls

H10.full_verdict_cell: NULL — δ=0.249 (z=+0.25); all corpora converge similarly; no Quran-specific tightness constant

H11.full_verdict_cell: SUGGESTIVE — CN→VL_CV p=0.009 raw (not BH-sig); canonical≈reverse total TE; no ordering optimization

H12.full_verdict_cell: EQUATION_DERIVED — 0.53·T + 4.18·EL − 1.52 = 0; θ=82.7°; AUC=0.9975; 0% ctrl leakage (except 0.7% Bible)
